suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: VAL-GH-003 evidence check uses '[ -d ".github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE" ]' (directory check) but GitHub's standard convention for PR templates is a single file '.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md', not a directory. Update the evidence check to '[ -f ".github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md" ]' to match actual GitHub convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature community-templates correctly uses .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md (file) per GitHub standard, but validation contract checks for directory.
